subject: [PATCH v2 2/9] memcg: charge kmem pages and slab objects against per-node objcg

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch updates the way memory cgroup (memcg) charges kmem pages and slab objects against per-node object cgroups (objcgs). It introduces a new helper function __current_obj_cgroup(int nid) that allows callers to specify the target node for the objcg lookup. The patch then uses this helper in two places: __memcg_kmem_charge_page() and __memcg_slab_post_alloc_hook(). This change ensures that kmem pages and slab objects are charged against the correct per-node objcg, even when the allocating CPU's node differs from the allocation's node.
